info.name: BaSyx DPP API - Local
info.description: Requests for the local Docker Compose setup. Import `dpp-api.local.postman_environment.json`, select the environment, start `docker compose up --build`, then run the lifecycle requests in order. Content sections are dynamic top-level DPP properties that are not header fields, for example `batteryPassport`, `carbonFootprint`, `materialComposition`, `circularity`, and `supplyChain`. The service stores each content section as its own content submodel.

request.description: Creates a DPP with multiple large content sections. Run this before the read/update examples.

item.name: Read DPP by DPP ID - Full Representation

request.description: Deletes the sample DPP. Run this last if you want to clean up the created resource.
Uses `historicalDate`. The create request sets this to the creation time so this can be used before or after patch/delete.

item.name: Resolve Product IDs to DPP IDs

request.description: Default element path reads `batteryPassport/energyCapacityKWh`. You can change `elementPath` to nested values such as `batteryPassport/dimensionsMm.length`.
The implementation accepts raw JSON values for element updates. This updates a scalar number.
Updates a nested collection-style element with a larger JSON object.
Served by the local API container and useful for checking the active spec.
